ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for customer support */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the airline */,
  "airline_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the airline */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the airline was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airline_fleet" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet record */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline that owns the fleet */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft in the fleet */,
  "number_of_aircraft" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft of this type in the fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airline_fleet_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight record */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline providing the flight */,
  "cheapest_price" REAL /* Cheapest price available for the flight */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price for the flight */,
  "flexibility" TEXT /* Details about booking flexibility (e.g., cancellation policy) */,
  "on_time_performance" TEXT /* On-time performance percentage */,
  "covid_safety_measures" TEXT /* COVID-19 safety measures implemented by the airline */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the flight (e.g., from-to) */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "lieu_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the search (e.g., cheapest, flexible) */,
  "num_results" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., travel agent, customer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price trend record */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline for which the price is recorded */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Recorded price on that date */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of price trend (e.g., average, cheapest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight was booked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the booking (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the flight (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the flight experience */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_reviews_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellation_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation policy */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline associated with the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the cancellation policy */,
  "cancel_fee" REAL /* Cancellation fee associated with the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellation_policies_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_safety_measures" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 safety measure */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline associated with the safety measures */,
  "measures_description" TEXT /* Description of the safety measures in place */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the safety measures were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_safety_measures_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that offers this destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the destination */,
  "destination_code" TEXT /* IATA code for the destination airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_destinations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES user_bookings ("booking_id")
)
